name: Tool List
description: Dense two-column list of tools or features with monospace names and muted descriptions. CLI-style layout with colored dot bullets and a colored left border accent per item. Each item gets a unique color from a rotating palette. Hover highlights the row background. Pure text layout with no component dependencies.

standard.description: Two-column grid of tool items with no gap between rows. Each item has: a 4px colored left border accent, a colored dot bullet (6px circle), a monospace tool name in the item's accent color, and a muted description below. Items have subtle bottom borders and a semi-transparent background that brightens on hover. Colors rotate through coral, amber, cyan, green, yellow, orange, purple, pink, crimson. Layout: 2-column grid on desktop, single column on mobile.

slots.tool-name: Tool name displayed in monospace font with _mono _fs[0.82rem] _fw600 _mb1. Includes a colored dot bullet (6px circle, inline-block, flex-shrink-0) before the name. Both the dot and name text use the item's accent color from the rotation palette. Wrapped in a _flex _items[center] _gap2 container.
slots.tool-description: Tool description with _fs[0.82rem] _fgmuted _lh[1.4]. Brief one-line description of the tool's purpose.

compact.description: Single-column layout with denser spacing. Same colored dot bullets and monospace names, but items are stacked in a single column for narrower containers or longer lists. Reduced padding for a more compact feel.

slots.tool-name: Monospace tool name with colored dot bullet, _mono _fs[0.8rem] _fw600. Color from rotating palette.
Monospace name with colored dot bullet

visual_brief: Dense two-column list of tools or features. Each item shows a colored dot bullet on the left (cycling through a rotating palette), the tool name in monospace medium-weight text, and a muted description beside or below it. A thin colored left border accent matches the dot color per item. Rows highlight on hover with a subtle background tint. The compact preset reduces line height and removes descriptions, showing names only. Pure text layout with no images or icons, relying on typography and color accents for visual hierarchy.

responsive.mobile: Single-column list. Names and descriptions stack vertically per item. Full-width rows.
responsive.tablet: Two-column list if items fit. Comfortable row spacing.
responsive.desktop: Two-column grid with items distributed evenly. Hover effects visible. Full descriptions inline.

layout_hints.scan_priority: Tool name comes first, then a short supporting description. The color dot and border are just enough to help scan, not enough to become the main content.
layout_hints.density: This pattern is meant to be compact and text-forward. Keep rows tight and consistent so the list feels like a curated inventory rather than a card gallery.
layout_hints.column_balance: In two-column layouts, maintain even visual weight between columns instead of letting one side become noticeably denser or longer.

motion.micro: Rows may brighten slightly on hover and focused tool names may sharpen subtly for keyboard users.
motion.transitions: Filtering or list updates should preserve the sense of a stable catalog rather than reflowing with flashy animation.

keyboard: If items are interactive, focus should move tool by tool in reading order without exposing decorative accents as separate stops.
announcements: Tool name and description should be exposed semantically so the list remains meaningful without relying on colored bullets or borders.
